note: Millfield has the most advanced sport infrastructure of any UK boarding school. Football: self-described as Europe's leading independent school football programme — 12 UEFA A/B licensed coaches (EFL Championship Academy standard), 11 pitches including a Premier League Category Two standard pitch, 300+ students play each term. Club links include Plymouth Argyle, Exeter City, Bristol City, West Ham, Cardiff City and scout attendance from Man City, Arsenal, Chelsea, Newcastle and Aston Villa. 2025 ESFA National Champions. Golf: purpose-built John Graveney Golf Centre (indoor, 6 practice bays, 81sqm Huxley putting green), 350-yard driving range, 9-hole pitch & putt, 2 PGA professionals. Championship course access at Burnham & Berrow, Yeovil and Enmore. World Schools Challenge Champions (2009, 2011); HMC winners 12 times in 16 years; European Schools Team Champions (2016, 2017).
